title: The system shall be cost-effective.
description: The system shall be affordable to many and have no hardware limitations.

title: The system shall be flexible.
description: The system shall work effectively in different places.

title: The system shall have a competitive price.
description: The system shall cost way less than all other systems in the market.

title: The system shall have a user-friendly interface.
description: The system shall be easy to use and have more interactive features than traditional touch projectors.

title: The system shall be secure.
description: The system shall store user account information in a secure database.
